name: Gold IOU — Tranche B
tagline: Gold-backed IOU instrument — Deal Series B — issued via Troptions Gateway.
description: XAUB is a gold-backed IOU issued by the Troptions Gateway on the XRP Ledger and Stellar mainnet. Each unit represents a redeemable claim on gold (XAU) value under the terms of the Troptions Deal Series B project agreement. Issuance, transfer, and redemption are governed by the Troptions compliance framework and applicable deal documentation.
longDescription: XAUB is Tranche B of the Troptions Gold IOU series, complementing the BTCB Bitcoin IOU for the second Troptions capital-deployment project. The issuer (Troptions Gateway) maintains gold or gold-equivalent reserves in a segregated custody arrangement. Holders may present XAUB IOUs for redemption against physical gold, gold futures, or USD-equivalent value subject to KYC verification and deal terms. The instrument is issued on both XRPL (hex currency code 5841554200000000000000000000000000000000) and Stellar (asset code XAUB) from the governance-controlled issuer addresses.

compliance.redemptionTerms: Redemption requires KYC verification and execution of deal Series B gold redemption form. Gold or USD-equivalent disbursed within 5 business days.
compliance.custodyArrangement: Segregated gold or gold-equivalent custody, verifiable on request.
